allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''''name:'''', d.get\(''''name''''\)\); print\(''''scripts:'''', json.dumps\(d.get\(''''scripts'''',{}\), indent=2\)\)")
